query: ALTER TABLE time_inconsistencies CHANGE COLUMN company_id companyId INT NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN employee_id employeeId INT NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN obra_id obraId INT, CHANGE COLUMN time_record_id timeRecordId INT, CHANGE COLUMN mes_referencia mesReferencia VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN tipo_inconsistencia tipoInconsistencia ENUM('batida_impar','falta_batida','horario_divergente','batida_duplicada','sem_registro') NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN resolvido_por resolvidoPor VARCHAR(255), CHANGE COLUMN resolvido_em resolvidoEm DATE, CHANGE COLUMN warning_id warningId INT, CHANGE COLUMN created_at createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CHANGE COLUMN updated_at updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute ALTER TABLE time_inconsistencies CHANGE COLUMN company_id companyId INT NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN employee_id employeeId INT NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN obra_id obraId INT, CHANGE COLUMN time_record_id timeRecordId INT, CHANGE COLUMN mes_referencia mesReferencia VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN tipo_inconsistencia tipoInconsistencia ENUM('batida_impar','falta_batida','horario_divergente','batida_duplicada','sem_registro') NOT NULL, CHANGE COLUMN resolvido_por resolvidoPor VARCHAR(255), CHANGE COLUMN resolvido_em resolvidoEm DATE, CHANGE COLUMN warning_id warningId INT, CHANGE COLUMN created_at createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CHANGE COLUMN updated_at updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
